title: Create: Upgraded Automation
description: A Create mod addon with tons of new recipes to help automation!
body:
![the logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d4492bb3816c8e7e660a835a59e3795ae4003ec_0.webp)

More recipes, more automation!

## Recipes
- **Netherrack**: Spout 1 bucket (1000mb) of Lava onto Blackstone
- **Desk Bell**: 1 Wooden Slab and 1 Gold Sheet
- _**and much more coming soon!**_


## CREATE 6 ONLY!!!
 _**Currently only 1.21.1, More versions coming soon!**_
